author_display_name: The XSS Rat - Proud XSS N00b :-)
text:
Myth: you need to be a math wizard to hack the web.
Truth: you need curiosity and a half-decent notepad.
That's it. That's the whole secret.

The 901 Beginner Web Hacking Guide — built for the rat that's still finding their feet 🐀
👉 https://t.co/QUkGhFdey9
#bugbounty #infosec

I typed a wrong OTP.  

The website still let me in.  

No hacking tools. 
No special skills. 
Just Burp Suite and one changed line. 

The bug is 2 years old. 
Still unfixed.  

Here's exactly what I did 🧵

#bugbounty #infosec

Always open to hunt together. Dm for collab.
#bugbounty

🚨 HIGH SEVERITY: CVE-2026-45251 (CVSS 7.8)

Use-after-free vulnerability in file descriptor handling allows unprivileged local users to escalate to superuser privileges. Affects poll(2)/select(2) system calls.

Patch immediately.

#CVE #Vulnerability #PatchNow https://t.co/wcRBzukP7T

I earned $1,000 for my submission on @bugcrowd. Same program and they again downgraded P2 to P3 without any solid reasoning. 
#ItTakesACrowd #bughunting #bugbountytips https://t.co/xZFZxSbdhm

🚨 HIGH severity CVE-2026-39461 (CVSS 8.8) affects libcasper(3) in FreeBSD. Stack corruption flaw allows local privilege escalation to root via file descriptor manipulation. Patch immediately if running setuid root apps. #CVE #Vulnerability #PatchNow #ThreatIntel https://t.co/TBKpV3svZN

🚨 HIGH severity CVE-2026-28764 (CVSS 7.8)

Heap-based buffer overflow in MediaArea MediaInfoLib LXF element parsing. Local attack vector, no privileges required.

Patch immediately if using MediaInfoLib.

#CVE #Vulnerability #PatchNow https://t.co/TjDlOVkZCY

🚨 HIGH: CVE-2026-45250 (CVSS 7.8) - Stack buffer overflow in setcred(2) system call allows unprivileged local users to gain elevated privileges via kernel code execution. Patch immediately. #CVE #Vulnerability #PatchNow #ThreatIntel https://t.co/Rvy7f1dPFm

🚨 HIGH SEVERITY: CVE-2026-44068 (CVSS 7.6)

Netatalk 2.1.0-4.4.2 vulnerable to path traversal via crafted extended attributes. Remote authenticated attackers can write files outside intended namespace.

Patch immediately.

#CVE #Vulnerability #PatchNow https://t.co/ddrN8UVH5X

🚨 HIGH Severity: CVE-2026-44066 (CVSS 7.1)

Heap out-of-bounds reads in Netatalk 3.1.0-4.4.2 Spotlight RPC code. Remote authenticated attackers can steal sensitive data or disrupt service. Patch immediately.

#CVE #Vulnerability #PatchNow #ThreatIntel https://t.co/THrizoS8B9

🚨 HIGH Severity: CVE-2026-44064 (CVSS 7.1)

Out-of-bounds read in Netatalk 1.3-4.4.2 ASP session handling. Adjacent attackers can cause DoS or info disclosure via crafted requests. Patch immediately.

#CVE #Vulnerability #PatchNow #ThreatIntel #DFIR https://t.co/AggSkDFbKe

Just trust
